name: Butterfly

skills.name: Assassination
skills.description: Butterfly gains 2 stacks of mark from defeating heroes and 1 stack fromassisting or killing monsters/minions. At 3 stacks, the next skill used willnot enter cooldown.

skills.name: Whirlwind
skills.description: Butterfly deals damage to enemies around her and gains a shield. HerMovement Speed increases during this time.

skills.name: Sword Propel
skills.description: Butterfly deals damage in the target direction and inflicts slow.

skills.name: Death Dealer
skills.description: Butterfly jumps to the target and deals damagelf the target is defeated within a certain period of time, the cooldown of thisskill is refreshed.

tips: Butterfly is a Medium Warrior (Jungling) on Honor of Kings Global. Camp HOK ranks them Tier B with 52.4% win rate and 0.5% pick rate as of 2026-06-05.
Best build path: Boots of Resistance → Rapacious Bite → Axe of Torment → Master Sword → Immovable - Sky Dome → Cuirass of Savagery.
Run Mutation for stats that match Butterfly's Warrior kit. Take Smite — swap to Purify against heavy CC or Smite when jungling.
Standard trade: Whirlwind → Sword Propel → Death Dealer → weave basic attacks. Weave basic attacks between skill casts for passive value.
Laning: Clear to level four, then gank the lane with the least escape. Secure Tyrant when your bot or mid has crash wave.
Teamfight: Flank or dive backline after tanks commit. Do not start fights without vision on enemy jungler.
Butterfly excels into Heino, Sakeer, Angela. Avoid blind picking into Hou Yi, Marco Polo, Lady Sun without team peel.

Butterfly sits at Tier B globally (52.4% WR). In high rank, pick only into favorable matchups or when you have a dedicated pocket pick. Camp data shows above-average win rate — prioritize when not hard-countered in draft.

faqs.question: Is Butterfly good in the current meta?
faqs.answer: Butterfly is Tier B Warrior with 52.4% win rate, 0.5% pick rate, and 0.1% ban rate on Honor of Kings Global (Camp HOK, 2026-06-05). Niche — draft carefully.

faqs.question: What is the best Butterfly build?
faqs.answer: Core item path: Boots of Resistance, Rapacious Bite, Axe of Torment, Master Sword, Immovable - Sky Dome, Cuirass of Savagery. Run Mutation arcana with Smite. Switch to alternate build presets on this page for jungle, clash, or late-game setups.

faqs.question: How to counter Butterfly?
faqs.answer: Pick Hou Yi, Marco Polo, Lady Sun into Butterfly. Deny Jungling resources early and force fights before Butterfly completes core items. Butterfly struggles when the enemy can out-range or out-sustain them.

faqs.question: Who does Butterfly counter?
faqs.answer: Butterfly is strong into Heino, Sakeer, Angela according to HoKStats matchup data and role matchups on the global server. Draft Butterfly when the enemy relies on these heroes in the Jungling lane.

faqs.question: Is Butterfly good in high rank / Diamond+?
faqs.answer: Butterfly sits at Tier B globally (52.4% WR). In high rank, pick only into favorable matchups or when you have a dedicated pocket pick. Camp data shows above-average win rate — prioritize when not hard-countered in draft.

faqs.question: What lane should Butterfly play?
faqs.answer: Butterfly is tagged Jungling in Camp export (Fighter). Clear to level four, then gank the lane with the least escape. Secure Tyrant when your bot or mid has crash wave.

faqs.question: Best arcana and spells for Butterfly?
faqs.answer: Recommended: Mutation arcana. Battle spell: Smite. Adjust Purify/Execute based on enemy dive and jungle need.

faqs.question: Butterfly or Li Xin — which is better?
faqs.answer: Butterfly vs Li Xin (Warrior, Tier S+): Li Xin is 1.9% pick / 52.6% WR. Li Xin wins 0.2% more often globally. Choose Butterfly when you need Jungling identity; choose Li Xin for Clash Lane comfort.

faqs.question: Should I ban Butterfly?
faqs.answer: Low priority ban (0.1%). Focus bans on higher-tier Warrior picks unless targeting a one-trick.

metaAnalysis: Tier B Warrior · Jungling · difficulty Medium.

Butterfly sits at Tier B globally (52.4% WR). In high rank, pick only into favorable matchups or when you have a dedicated pocket pick. Camp data shows above-average win rate — prioritize when not hard-countered in draft.
Matchups: strong into Heino, Sakeer, Angela; weak into Hou Yi, Marco Polo, Lady Sun.
Butterfly vs Li Xin (Warrior, Tier S+): Li Xin is 1.9% pick / 52.6% WR. Li Xin wins 0.2% more often globally. Choose Butterfly when you need Jungling identity; choose Li Xin for Clash Lane comfort.

Butterfly vs Chicha (Warrior, Tier S): Chicha is 1.5% pick / 50.2% WR. Butterfly has +2.2% WR vs Chicha in Camp data. Choose Butterfly when you need Jungling identity; choose Chicha for Clash Lane comfort.
Draft tip: counter-pick or comfort pick when lane matchup is favorable.

skillOrder.priority: Skill 2 → Skill 1 → Death Dealer (max Skill 2 first)
skillOrder.reason: Sword Propel provides mobility or stick—max first. Whirlwind second for damage. Death Dealer on every level.
